content:
In the vscode environment using rust-analyzer as an lsp, when using the Mutex type, I experienced its member field is not autocompleted.

The kernel module code used was the Training code introduced by Benno Lossin in his presentation The pin-init API training at Kangrejos 2023.

  • https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/compare/rust-next...y86-dev:linux:kangrejos-2023-training-solution

The details of the problematic situation and what vscode's autocomplete popup shows are at this link.

  • https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/commit/750c970542fc64bca600835f820c1d7900d97a46
In this case, how do I get rust-analyzer to autocomplete for member fields for a mutex type?
